message:
style(fsqlite-e2e/perf_update_delete): rustfmt indentation on benchmark create

Re-indent the `.map_err(...)` continuation after `conn.execute(BENCH_CREATE_SQL)`
so that it lines up with the preceding method call under rustfmt's standard
four-space continuation rule. Pure formatting; no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
